description_long: This object is an ornate chandelier-style necklace featuring a circular gold frame adorned with intricate crystal or glass beadwork. The main body is composed of a lattice of shimmering stones, forming a teardrop-shaped structure that tapers upward. Around the perimeter, six candle-like extensions with white tips and gold bases add a regal, vintage touch. The gold framework is detailed with decorative flourishes and small hanging pendants, enhancing its luxurious appearance. The central section is densely packed with reflective elements, creating a dazzling effect under light. The overall design is reminiscent of 19th-century European jewelry, exuding opulence and grandeur.
description: An elaborate chandelier-style necklace with gold framework, crystal beadwork, and candle-like extensions, exuding vintage luxury.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical arrangement of six candle-like extensions and the dense crystal latticework.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated, revealing more of the side detailing and the three-dimensional depth of the beadwork.
description_view_2: Further rotated, highlighting the curvature of the gold frame and the intricate hanging pendants.
description_view_3: Back view, showing the rear structure of the necklace and the continuity of the crystal lattice.
